# HydroWild — Full Site Reference

> HydroWild makes science-backed, zero-sugar, zero-dye hydration drinks for kids and teens: 9 vitamins and electrolytes in four wild flavors, made in the USA. Founded in 2022 by CJ and Lindey Britton in Birmingham, Alabama. Contact: support@hydrowild.com.

---

## Home — Get Wild. Stay Hydrated.
Science-backed hydration for kids and teens. 9 vitamins and electrolytes, nothing artificial, and a legendary critter in every flavor. Zero sugar. Zero dyes. 100% wild. Made in the USA. Kid-approved.

The Wild Variety Pack includes all four flavors — 32 stick packs total, 9 vitamins and electrolytes, made in the USA, no artificial ingredients.

## Naturally Good. Wildly Good For You.
- 0 g sugar. Ever.
- 7 essential vitamins.
- 2 key electrolytes — potassium and magnesium.
- 100% free of artificial dyes.

Most "kids drinks" are candy in a bottle. The big sports drink brands pack more sugar than a donut and color it with petroleum-based dyes. HydroWild delivers real electrolytes and vitamins, sweetened with stevia — nothing your kid does not need.

## Flavors and Mascots
- Blue Raspberry — Yukon the Yeti
- Watermelon — Zara the Wampus Cat
- Strawberry Lemonade — Chessie & Nessie
- Fruit Punch — The Lil Kraken
- Wild Variety Pack — all four flavors together (32 stick packs)

## Our Story — Made by Parents. For Parents.
HydroWild was founded in 2022 by CJ and Lindey Britton in Birmingham, Alabama — two parents who got tired of choosing between hydration and a sugar crash. So they built the drink they wished existed: clean, science-backed, and wild enough that kids actually ask for it.

## The Science / Ingredients
HydroWild is sweetened with stevia and contains 9 vitamins and electrolytes, including the key electrolytes potassium and magnesium. It has no added sugar, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial dyes. Made in the USA.

## Contact
- Email: support@hydrowild.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/drinkhydrowild/
- Based in: Birmingham, Alabama
- Founded: 2022
- Wholesale and retail inquiries welcome via the contact form.

## FAQ
Q: What sweetener does HydroWild use?
A: Stevia — zero sugar and zero artificial sweeteners, a clean alternative to traditional kids sports drinks.

Q: How many vitamins and electrolytes are in each HydroWild pack?
A: 9, including the key electrolytes potassium and magnesium, with no artificial dyes or ingredients.

Q: Who founded HydroWild and why?
A: CJ and Lindey Britton founded it in 2022 in Birmingham, Alabama — parents tired of choosing between hydration and sugar crashes.

Q: What flavors does HydroWild offer?
A: Blue Raspberry, Watermelon, Strawberry Lemonade, and Fruit Punch — available together in the Wild Variety Pack.
